ALL REPORTS HAVE BEEN BETWEEN JOHNSON SHORTCUT ROAD AND SHADY GROVE ROAD NEAR PEE DEE HIGHWAY, AND CONSISTENT WITH DOWNBURST RELATED DAMAGE.

THERE WAS ALSO REPORTED DAMAGE TO A VEHICLE WITH THE TOP OF A PUMP HOUSE BLOWN OFF OF THE PUMP HOUSING AND ONTO THE VEHICLE. SEVERAL SMALL TREES WERE SHOWN TO BE SPLINTERED. VIDEO PROVIDED WITH THE DAMAGE SHOWS STRONG WINDS SCATTERING ADDITIONAL HEAVY DEBRIS; LIKELY DUE TO A DOWNBURST.
